issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you have less Life cards than your opponent' must be encoded as a condition checking Life differential. Current condition is 'Always', which ignores the life requirement entirely.
Target scope is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but card text says 'K.O. up to 1' — this should use 'maxTargets':1 or similar constraint. Current DSL doesn't express the 'up to 1' limit clearly.

Second effect (trigger:'Trigger' with PlayFromHand) has no trigger event specified and no condition. This appears to be fabricated — the card text contains no secondary effect allowing Character plays from hand. Remove this effect entirely.
